scripts.build:artifact:server: npm run build && npm run build:web:embedded && tsx apps/server/src/build-artifacts.main.ts server
scripts.build:artifact:agent: npm run build && tsx apps/server/src/build-artifacts.main.ts agent
scripts.build:artifacts: npm run build && npm run build:web:embedded && tsx apps/server/src/build-artifacts.main.ts server && tsx apps/server/src/build-artifacts.main.ts agent
